Document:
#Spells & Foci
## We Love Casting Spells [color=#8f63e6]Spells[/color] are your main form of weaponry, movement, and general utility.
You will only start with one [color=#8f63e6]Spell[/color], the [color=green]Mansus Grasp[/color]. Your [color=#8f63e6]Knowledge Store[/color] can be used to get more.
[color=#8f63e6]Spells[/color] can be activated using the action buttons. Many will require you to click on a target as well.
## Focus is Necessary
To cast more advanced spells, you must equip a [color=#8f63e6]Magic Focus[/color].
Your [color=red]Codex Cicatrix[/color] will function as a [color=#8f63e6]Focus[/color] when it is open and in your hand. It's only marked as contraband when open, and non-heretics cannot open it, so try to keep it closed.
You can acquire an [color=red]Amber Focus[/color] using the eponymous ritual. It will act as a [color=#8f63e6]Focus[/color] when worn around your neck, but it cannot be hidden like the codex.
Some more powerful heretical equipment also functions as a [color=#8f63e6]Focus[/color]- namely, the [color=red]Ominous Armor[/color] from the [color=#8f63e6]Armorer's Ritual[/color] (when the hood is flipped up).
[color=#8f63e6]Ascension[/color] disables the need for a [color=#8f63e6]Focus[/color].
